triggerExamples: Create an executive operator briefing for this industrial account.
Brief me on account risk using ERP sales, CRM, and fleet data.
Run the industrial account briefing for today's executive review.
confidenceHints: The user asks for executive or operator-level account context.
The requested sources include ERP, CRM, fleet, service capacity, sales, invoices, margin, or industrial account operations.
The expected output is a briefing or inspectable artifact, not a raw export.

inputs.label: Account or segment
inputs.description: The customer account, branch, region, territory, or segment the executive operator wants to review.

inputs.label: Review window
inputs.description: The period to compare, such as last 7 days, last 30 days, month to date, or quarter to date.

inputs.label: ERP, CRM, and fleet sources
inputs.description: Connected data, workspace files, catalog exports, or briefing datasets that provide ERP sales, CRM, and fleet-management evidence.

confirmation.title: Build Industrial Account Briefing
confirmation.summary: Computer will gather available ERP sales, CRM, and fleet-management context, synthesize operator-facing risks and opportunities, and produce a compact executive briefing artifact or Markdown fallback.
phaseSummary: Discover available ERP, CRM, and fleet source coverage.
Synthesize source-grounded account signals, contradictions, and next actions.
Produce an inspectable briefing artifact or compact Markdown fallback.

phases.title: Discover source coverage

supervision.progressExpectation: Find enough source coverage to state which ERP, CRM, and fleet signals are available. Stop after a bounded search; do not chase every possible field.

taskSeeds: Identify available ERP sales, CRM, and fleet-management datasets for the requested account or segment.

phases.title: Synthesize operator signals

supervision.progressExpectation: Normalize the available evidence into account changes, risks, contradictions, and next actions. Mark missing source families clearly.

taskSeeds: Create a source-grounded briefing dataset from the discovered ERP, CRM, and fleet evidence.

phases.title: Produce briefing

supervision.progressExpectation: Produce the artifact or Markdown fallback from the synthesized briefing dataset. Do not restart discovery unless required evidence is missing.

taskSeeds: Produce an executive operator briefing artifact or Markdown fallback.

outputs.title: Industrial account briefing artifact
outputs.description: An inspectable briefing artifact for executive operators reviewing account, revenue, CRM, and fleet signals.

outputs.title: Markdown briefing fallback
outputs.description: A compact Markdown brief when artifact production is unavailable.

outputs.title: Source coverage note
outputs.description: A note listing available and unavailable ERP, CRM, and fleet source families.
